mapper.select: SELECT rcp.*, sf.url FROM rd_culture_promotion rcp JOIN sys_files sf ON rcp.picture_id = sf.id where rcp.del_flag = '0' AND rcp.status = 1 ORDER BY sort_index
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rd_culture_promotion(id, title, picture_id, website, status, del_flag, sort_index, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, version) VALUES
( #{item.id }, #{item.title}, #{item.pictureId}, #{item.website}, #{item.status}, #{item.delFlag},#{item.sortIndex}, #{item.createBy},#{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy},#{item.updateTime},#{item.version} )
on duplicate key update title = VALUES(title), picture_id = VALUES(picture_id), website = VALUES(website), status = VALUES(status), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag),sort_index = VALUES(sort_index), create_by = VALUES(create_by), create_time = VALUES(create_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time), version = VALUES(version)
